creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Ivan Rozhuk from comment #1)

Looking at the log, it seems that clang is indeed used for compilation. However, it seems that GCC is also installed as some indirect dependency, and that switching from lang/gcc12 to lang/gcc13 breaks something.

(In reply to Ivan Rozhuk from comment #2)

I suggest you first finish to update the port, then we try to understand what is going wrong here.
